text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Why are you working on a holiday?
choice_data_list: There's a lot to be done at the end of the year.
There's a lot to be done at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... So, is there anything I can help with?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I don't really have any plans, so... I'm free.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about me. I don't have anything else
planned for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Don't give me that look. Not everyone has a
festive day all planned out, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I already stopped by a party, so I was just going
to relax for the rest of the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You seriously need to learn to be more tactful.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you don't have to feel bad! Come on,
let's finish up your work quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You do even more work than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You do even more work than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I always knew you worked hard, but
seeing all these piles of paper in person...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well... It's a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You really haven't changed a bit, have you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I figured you'd say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She chuckles softly and continues to work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She chuckles softly and continues to work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm not sure if I should let her help me for
the rest of the day. She's been busy too, and she
needs a day off...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Here, I'll take care of those documents
nex—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? But there's still paperwork left...
choice_data_list: The holidays only come once a year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Fine. We can deal with the rest later. I'm still
going to help, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're right, we should have some fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Not because I like helping you or anything. I just
hate leaving things half finished.
choice_data_list: Let me treat you to dinner as thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll help you with the rest later. Just let me know
when you get to it.
choice_data_list: Let me treat you to dinner as thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You want to have dinner? With me? Today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You don't need to thank me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But wouldn't that... I don't know. Wouldn't that
almost be like a... I wasn't expecting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've always been the one who should be thanking
you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it's just dinner so... Fine, I'll go. Eating
together's not a big deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go. I haven't gone out for dinner in a
long time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... I'll go change since we're going out. Wait
here, okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but before we head out, I should change.
Wait here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Figures everywhere would be full.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Figures everywhere would be full.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to apologize. We found a diner
with an open table, at least.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It took me off guard when that family called out
to me, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then other people started noticing me...
choice_data_list: This hasn't been a very relaxing time, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, it hasn't been that bad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not like before. Now I know what those looks
mean.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So don't worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've been to a diner, and I
had fun. I didn't know they had such a big menu.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: If you ask me, where you're eating isn't as important as who you're eating with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Saying that out loud was a little embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Stop staring! Just pretend I didn't say anything!
That's the polite thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I meant what I said. I wanted to make sure
you knew that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Anyway, happy holidays, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Here's to a productive winter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Here's to a productive winter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The restaurant was nice and relaxing, and the
food was good, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you even knew about a place like
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it felt all... grown-up, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then again, I guess you are an actual adult.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Can we talk a little more? Let's go somewhere
quieter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: While I was helping you earlier, I got to thinking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I do feel like you're a hopeless idiot sometimes,
but... you're a proper adult, in your own way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You work so hard I sometimes worry about you,
but... you really are a proper adult.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I was lost, you pulled me through and set
my sights forward again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I was lost, you pulled me through and set
my sights forward again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I was at my weakest and doubted
myself, you called me strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Being able to lead someone like that shows how
mature you are, and I admire that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not. I'm just speaking the truth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
For someone who's always flattering me, you sure
are quick to get shy when the tables are turned.
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I just... think it's incredible.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Always being mindful of another person and
guiding them... That's something only a real adult
can do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I still don't know what the future holds for me,
but... if I'm going to become something, I think I'd
like to be someone like you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to guide others toward their own dreams of
becoming something, someone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: That's the kind of person I'd like to be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Or something like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey... You're shivering. Are you cold?
choice_data_list: That's the best gift I've ever received...
That's the best gift I've ever received...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Stupid. That wasn't even a present.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, stop it. I have an actual present for you, you
know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Here. You can open it, but I don't want to hear
any complaints.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Here you go. I hope you like it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I open the present and see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...It's a brooch. It's small, so it shouldn't get in
your way or anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't have any special meaning. I just saw
how it was glowing so gently and... picked it up
without realizing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And then I just happened to think about you, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And... I thought it would look good on you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I hope you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. I hope you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I gaze down at the sparkling
town below us, enjoying our quiet night together.
